title: neodistemon indicus
intro: Neodistemon indicus, also known as the Indian rubber plant, is a flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The leaves and roots of the Neodistemon indicus plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Neodistemon indicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
